message:
fix(dashboard): reduce UBS scan frequency from 1s to 30s

The dashboard was triggering UBS scans at the same 1-second interval as
pane refreshes. This caused excessive scanning while the dashboard was
open, especially problematic for large repositories.

Changes:
- Add separate ScanRefreshInterval constant (30 seconds)
- Add lastScanFetch timestamp and scanRefreshInterval field
- Decouple scan timing from pane refresh timing

The scan now runs every 30 seconds instead of every 1 second, reducing
CPU and disk usage significantly while still providing timely feedback.

Fixes: ntm-17sx

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"ntm-161","title":"Implement ntm mail inbox command","description":"# Implement ntm mail inbox Command

## Purpose

Display an AGGREGATE inbox view showing messages across ALL agents in the project, not just NTM's coordinator messages.

## IMPORTANT: Aggregate View

This is not just NTM's inbox. It shows:
1. Messages TO any agent in the project (GreenCastle, BlueLake, etc.)
2. Messages FROM any agent in the project
3. Filtered by session agents if desired

This gives the user visibility into all agent-to-agent communication.

## Command Syntax

```bash
# Show all messages in project (across all agents)
ntm mail inbox myproject

# Filter to session's agents only
ntm mail inbox myproject --session-agents

# Filter to specific agent
ntm mail inbox myproject --agent GreenCastle

# Urgent only
ntm mail inbox myproject --urgent

# JSON for scripts
ntm mail inbox myproject --json
```

## Output Format

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Project Inbox: myproject (5 agents)                         │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ ● #42 [URGENT] API Review Needed                            │
│   GreenCastle → BlueLake                                    │
│   2 minutes ago │ Thread: FEAT-123 │ ⚠️ Ack required         │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ ○ #41 Tests passing, ready for merge                        │
│   RedStone → GreenCastle, BlueLake                          │
│   15 minutes ago │ Thread: FEAT-123                         │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ ○ #40 Starting work on src/api/**                           │
│   ntm_myproject → all                                       │
│   30 minutes ago │ (coordinator announcement)               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
Showing messages involving: GreenCastle, BlueLake, RedStone, ntm_myproject
```

## Implementation

1. Discover all agents in project via Agent Mail
2. Fetch inbox for EACH agent
3. Deduplicate (same message may appear in multiple inboxes)
4. Sort by timestamp
5. Display with sender → recipient format

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Shows messages across ALL project agents
- [ ] Deduplication (message shown once even if multiple recipients)
- [ ] Filter by --session-agents, --agent, --urgent
- [ ] Clear indication of sender → recipient
- [ ] Coordinator messages distinguished from agent messages
- [ ] --json output for scripts","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ChartreuseLake","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:18:48.350455-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-10T21:21:36.691718-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-10T21:21:36.691718-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-161","depends_on_id":"ntm-yxa","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:19:55.9288-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"ntm-1igj","title":"[EPIC] Dashboard Layout Polish","description":"# Epic: Dashboard Layout Polish

## Goal
Perfect responsive behavior at any terminal size. The dashboard should adapt gracefully from ultrawide monitors to narrow terminal windows.

## Background
This is future work - lower priority than reliability and core polish. These issues exist but don't significantly impact day-to-day usage.

Current issues:
- Columns suddenly disappear when width decreases
- Badges don't scale gracefully
- Spacing could be more generous

## Success Criteria
- Smooth visual transitions at all breakpoints
- Clear indication when content is hidden
- Consistent spacing and alignment

## Beads in this Epic
- T10: Column visibility indicators
- T11: Fixed-width badge rendering
- T12: Panel padding evaluation

## Design Philosophy
- **Graceful degradation**: Content should shrink before hiding
- **Transparency**: Users should know if content is hidden
- **Breathing room**: Premium apps don't feel cramped","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:00:53.972098-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T20:50:57.49442-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T20:50:57.49442-05:00","close_reason":"All 3 tasks complete: T10 (column visibility indicators), T11 (fixed-width badges), T12 (padding evaluation - found consistent, no changes needed)"}

 {"id":"ntm-1n9s","title":"T9: Standardized truncation using single-character ellipsis","description":"# T9: Standardized Truncation Using Single-Character Ellipsis

## Parent Epic
[EPIC] Dashboard Visual Polish (ntm-af32)

## Problem Statement
Truncation is inconsistent across the codebase:

\`\`\`go
// Some places use three periods:
title = title[:maxLen-3] + "..."

// Some use single ellipsis:
title = layout.TruncateRunes(title, maxLen, "…")

// Some use custom suffixes:
title = truncate(title, maxLen, ">>")
\`\`\`

This inconsistency:
- Looks unprofessional
- Uses different character counts (3 vs 1)
- Makes width calculations inconsistent

## Solution
Standardize on single-character ellipsis "…" everywhere:

- Unicode: U+2026 HORIZONTAL ELLIPSIS
- Takes 1 character width
- Looks cleaner than "..."
- More precise truncation

## Implementation Details

### Standard Truncation Function
\`\`\`go
// internal/tui/layout/truncate.go

// TruncateRunes truncates string to maxLen runes, adding suffix if truncated.
// Always use this function for truncation - never manual string slicing.
func TruncateRunes(s string, maxLen int, suffix string) string {
    runes := []rune(s)
    if len(runes) <= maxLen {
        return s
    }
    if maxLen <= len(suffix) {
        return suffix[:maxLen]
    }
    return string(runes[:maxLen-len([]rune(suffix))]) + suffix
}

// Truncate is a convenience wrapper using "…" suffix.
func Truncate(s string, maxLen int) string {
    return TruncateRunes(s, maxLen, "…")
}
\`\`\`

### Search and Replace Pattern
Find all instances of:
- \`+ "..."\`
- \`+ ">>"\`
- Manual truncation without TruncateRunes

Replace with:
\`\`\`go
layout.Truncate(text, maxLen)
// or if custom suffix needed:
layout.TruncateRunes(text, maxLen, "…")
\`\`\`

### Files to Audit
\`\`\`bash
rg '\.\.\."|>\">|\"\.\.\"' --type go
rg '\[:[0-9]+\].*\+.*"' --type go  # Manual slice + concat
\`\`\`

### Files to Modify
- All dashboard panels
- Layout helpers
- Robot output formatters (if any)
- Any file using manual truncation

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All truncation uses TruncateRunes or Truncate
- [ ] All truncation uses "…" (not "...")
- [ ] No manual string slicing for truncation
- [ ] Width calculations account for 1-char ellipsis
- [ ] Visual consistency across all panels

## Examples

### Before (Inconsistent)
\`\`\`
Files:  src/authentication/handlers/login...
Beads:  Implement user registration flow>>
CASS:   Previous discussion about auth…
\`\`\`

### After (Consistent)
\`\`\`
Files:  src/authentication/handlers/login…
Beads:  Implement user registration flow…
CASS:   Previous discussion about auth…
\`\`\`

## Testing Notes
1. Resize terminal to trigger truncation
2. Verify all truncated text uses "…"
3. Verify truncation happens at correct length
4. Test with Unicode text (emojis, CJK characters)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:00:43.192205-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T20:36:21.061051-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T20:36:21.061051-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented standardized truncation with single-character ellipsis (…) across TUI","comments":[{"id":22,"issue_id":"ntm-1n9s","author":"jemanuel","text":"## Build-On-Existing Infrastructure Note

**EXISTING HELPER** (in `internal/tui/layout/layout.go:67-81`):
```go
func TruncateRunes(s string, max int, suffix string) string {
    if max <= 0 { return "" }
    runes := []rune(s)
    if len(runes) <= max { return s }
    if max < len([]rune(suffix)) { return string(runes[:max]) }
    return string(runes[:max-len([]rune(suffix))]) + suffix
}
```

**THE PROBLEM**: 21+ places still use `...` instead of `…`:
- `internal/scanner/bridge.go:314`
- `internal/alerts/generator.go:299`
- `internal/robot/robot.go:2061`
- `internal/robot/markdown.go:511`
- `internal/cli/history.go:550`
- `internal/cli/mail.go:751`
- `internal/output/text.go:116`
- And 14+ more locations

**WHAT THIS BEAD DOES**:
1. Add convenience wrapper: `func Truncate(s string, maxLen int) string { return TruncateRunes(s, maxLen, "…") }`
2. Find and replace ALL inconsistent truncation
3. Remove local `truncate()` functions that duplicate this logic

**THIS IS AN AUDIT + STANDARDIZATION TASK**, not creating new functionality.

**Testing**: Run `rg '\+ "\.\.\."' --type go` to find remaining inconsistencies.","created_at":"2025-12-15T21:17:27Z"}]}
